title: Harris Ultimate Chisel Knife 1in
features: Easy to use: Convenient and simple use
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Ultimate Chisel Knife 1in Contains 1 x Harris Ultimate Chisel Knife 1in Clean with warm soapy water after use and dry before storage. For use cleaning out cracks and holes in wood or plaster before filling. The chisel knife has been specifically designed and engineered for repairing cracks or holes in wood and plaster. For chiseling wood. Hardened and tempered steel blade for strength and durability. Soft grip handle. Suggested use For use cleaning out cracks and holes in wood or plaster before filling. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier
